headings: h2: £48 million investment for world-leading Wound Innovation Institute
text_excerpt: News and Events | University of Hull Study Life at Hull Research Collaborate News & events Alumni About Search Search Search Main menu Toggle menu Home chevron right News and events News and events Keep up-to-date with the very latest news and developments for the University of Hull, and find out more about our upcoming events. Top story £48 million investment for world-leading Wound Innovation Institute The University of Hull is establishing a £48m internationally leading translational wound research institute in East Yorkshire. Find out more upload Featured Event Undergraduate Open Day Whoever you are, wherever you’re from and wherever you want to go in life, we’d love to meet you. Experience Hull on an Open Day and see what makes our campus feel like home. Explore our green, walkable campus, meet lecturers and students, and discover how one day here could shape your future.
